caption: A female presenter appears in a small rectangular video overlay in the bottom right corner of a presentation screen. She has long dark hair and is wearing a pink garment. The presentation slides feature a white background with a logo in the bottom left and the text "Walchand Institute of Technology, Solapur" along the bottom. The initial slide is titled "References" and lists "Text Book: Let Us C - Yashwant Kanetkar". As the sequence progresses, the presentation transitions to a closing slide that simply displays the text "Thank you" centered on the screen. The presenter remains in her position in the video overlay throughout the transition, maintaining a steady gaze toward the camera. The scene remains static except for the change in the presentation slide content, moving from the reference list to the final thank you message.
